title: Despicable Me gif. Three minions celebrate together cheerfully as one blows out a party horn. Text, "It's time to Party!"

party GIF
Video gif. Women wearing cheetah-print outfits dance and shake their hips.
Movie gif. Kristen Wiig as Annie in Bridesmaids stands on an airplane as she sways and dips sluggishly. Text, "I'm ready to paaaarty!" with heavy emphasis on the party.

Cartoon gif. Mario is rocking out hard, with two hands spread apart in the rock on symbol and the peace sign. His eyes are closed and his legs shake in unison with his head, which is head banging.
Video gif. We slowly zoom out of a flashy and colorful dance party, where two people trotting in place in a zebra costume are the center of attention.
Video gif. A child dressed like a cowboy does a flashy 360 spin and points finger guns to one side.
Muppets gif. A crowd of Muppets at eye level and up on a balcony dance in unison as they shimmy and bop their heads.
I Love Lucy Party GIF

Video gif. Young girl in a pink turtleneck and a sparkling birthday cone hat is overcome with excitement at what appears to be a family birthday. A man yells something towards us behind her and, all of a sudden, she picks up a bowl of colorful balls and smashes it on the floor in front of her, raising her arms in the air like she's totally pumped about it.
The Office gif. Steve Carell as Michael and Rainn Wilson as Dwight raise the roof as they pump their palms toward the ceiling and bob their heads rhythmically.

TV gif. Jennifer Coolidge as Tanya McQuoid in "The White Lotus" is wearing a gold-speckled black chiffon veil over her head on a swaying boat. She awkwardly cracks a smile as she raises a glass of champagne and says "Wee-hee!"
TV gif. Comedian Rob Huebel of Children's Hospital throws a handful of metallic confetti into the air in a dramatic, fluttering cloud.

Video gif. A poodle wearing a leather jacket, disco ball sunglasses, silver party pants, disco ball necklace, and a party hat appears behind a door that opens slowly. They lean against the door and strike a pose and the resulting image is ridiculous. Text, "Happy Birthday."
The Office gif. The office is filled with disco lights. Craig Robinson as Darryl, Oscar Nunez as Oscar, and Brian Baumgartner as Kevin show us some serious dance moves.
